Makna: Abnormal; different from the accepted norm
Mnemonik: A bear ant: Semut sebesar beruang itu jelas sangat abnormal.
Contoh_kalimat: The animal's aberrant behavior indicated it was sick.

Mnemonik: Obey ants: Semua semut patuh (obey) untuk berhenti sejenak (inaction).
Contoh_kalimat: The project is being held in abeyance until funding is secured.

Mnemonik: Absen konyol: Dia kabur diam-diam agar bisa memalsukan absen.
Contoh_kalimat: The cashier absconded with the money in the middle of the night.

Makna: Indicative of self-denial, particularly with food/drink
Mnemonik: Abs demi us: Demi perut abs (sixpack), kita harus menahan nafsu makan.
Contoh_kalimat: She led an abstemious lifestyle, avoiding alcohol and rich foods.

Mnemonik: Abs terus: Menjelaskan cara mendapat abs terus-menerus kadang sulit dipahami.
Contoh_kalimat: The professor's lecture on quantum physics was too abstruse for the freshmen.

Makna: Easy to understand, especially by a certain group
Mnemonik: Akses: Sesuatu yang mudah diakses berarti mudah dimengerti/dijangkau.
Contoh_kalimat: The museum made its exhibits accessible to visually impaired visitors.

Mnemonik: Acquiesce = Quiet: Setuju dengan diam (quiet) dan tanpa protes.
Contoh_kalimat: The acquiescent employee never questioned the manager's unreasonable demands.

Mnemonik: Acid: Mirip asam (acid) yang rasanya pahit dan tajam.
Contoh_kalimat: The acrid smoke from the burning tires filled the air.

Makna: Bitter in temper, manner, and speech
Mnemonik: A crime: Sebuah kejahatan (crime) memicu perdebatan yang pahit dan kasar.
Contoh_kalimat: The divorce was acrimonious, with both sides fighting over every asset.

Mnemonik: IQ men: Pria dengan IQ tinggi memiliki kecerdasan dan ketajaman mental.
Contoh_kalimat: Her business acumen led the startup to massive success.

Mnemonik: Add monitor: Menambah pengawasan sebagai bentuk teguran halus.
Contoh_kalimat: The teacher gave him a gentle admonition for speaking out of turn.

Mnemonik: Efek: Emosi yang memberikan efek pada perilaku.
Contoh_kalimat: The patient showed a flat affect, displaying no emotion at all.

Makna: To deliberately offend, as with a gesture
Mnemonik: In front: Menghina seseorang langsung di depan wajahnya.
Contoh_kalimat: He took her refusal to shake his hand as a personal affront.

Makna: To widen in scope or make bigger or greater
Mnemonik: Grand: Membuat sesuatu menjadi lebih grand (besar/agung).
Contoh_kalimat: The king built a massive palace to aggrandize his legacy.

Mnemonik: Agregat: Dalam sepak bola, skor agregat adalah jumlah total.
Contoh_kalimat: The aggregate score of the two games determined the champion.

Mnemonik: Alley: Bersembunyi di gang (alley) untuk meredakan ketakutan.
Contoh_kalimat: The mother tried to allay her child's fears of the dark.

Makna: To mix or blend together in a homogenous body
Mnemonik: Amalgam: Campuran logam gigi; artinya mencampur/menggabungkan.
Contoh_kalimat: The two companies decided to amalgamate into one giant corporation.

Mnemonik: Amelia rate: Rating Amelia naik karena dia memperbaiki kinerjanya.
Contoh_kalimat: The government implemented policies to ameliorate poverty.

Mnemonik: Ana + chrono: Chrono = waktu. Tidak sesuai dengan urutan waktu.
Contoh_kalimat: The modern wristwatch in the medieval movie was highly anachronous.

Makna: A short account of an interesting incident
Mnemonik: Anecdot: Cerita lucu/menarik (anekdot) singkat.
Contoh_kalimat: He told a funny anecdote about his first day at work.

Mnemonik: Archi (utama) + pelago (laut): Kumpulan pulau-pulau besar.
Contoh_kalimat: Indonesia is the largest archipelago in the world.

Mnemonik: Artikel: Berbicara sejelas tulisan di sebuah artikel.
Contoh_kalimat: She is an articulate speaker who easily persuades her audience.

Mnemonik: Artificial: Sesuatu yang buatan memerlukan kelicikan/keterampilan untuk menipu.
Contoh_kalimat: The magician used clever artifice to deceive the audience.

Mnemonik: Art (tipu daya) + less: Tanpa tipu daya, sangat tulus/polos.
Contoh_kalimat: Her artless charm made everyone instantly like her.

Mnemonik: Aset: Meninggalkan semua aset duniawi untuk hidup sederhana/bertapa.
Contoh_kalimat: The monk lived an ascetic life in the mountains, owning nothing.

Mnemonik: Ass in dust: Bekerja keras sampai duduk di debu, sangat gigih/tekun.
Contoh_kalimat: The assiduous student studied every night to pass the medical exam.

Mnemonik: A student: Siswa (student) terbaik biasanya sangat cerdas/tajam.
Contoh_kalimat: The astute detective quickly solved the complex mystery.

Mnemonik: Audi: Mengendarai mobil Audi dengan kecepatan tinggi butuh orang yang berani/nekat.
Contoh_kalimat: The climber made an audacious attempt to scale the peak without ropes.

Makna: To increase in measure or intensity
Mnemonik: Argumen: Berdebat membuat tensi meningkat.
Contoh_kalimat: He took a second job to augment his income.

Mnemonik: Aussie tear: Pemandangan padang pasir Australia yang keras dan sangat sederhana.
Contoh_kalimat: The austere room contained only a bed and a simple wooden chair.

Mnemonik: A virus: Keserakahan (greed) menyebar seperti virus.
Contoh_kalimat: The CEO's avarice led him to embezzle millions of dollars.

Mnemonik: Verify: Menyatakan kebenaran (verify) dengan tegas.
Contoh_kalimat: The witness averred that she had seen the defendant at the scene.

Mnemonik: Ban all: Melarang semua hal yang membosankan dan pasaran.
Contoh_kalimat: The pop song was criticized for its banal and repetitive lyrics.

Mnemonik: Basic: Sesuatu yang sangat dasar (rendahan/sederhana).
Contoh_kalimat: His base motives were driven entirely by greed.

Mnemonik: Be + lie: Menjadi pembohong (menutupi yang sebenarnya).
Contoh_kalimat: His calm smile belied the intense anger he felt inside.

Makna: To surround, as in an attack
Mnemonik: Be set: Pasukan sudah diatur (set) untuk mengepung.
Contoh_kalimat: The expedition was beset by bad weather and illness.

Mnemonik: Blow tent: Angin meniup tenda dengan sangat jelas dan mencolok.
Contoh_kalimat: Taking credit for her colleague's work was a blatant lie.

Mnemonik: Bantal guling: Bolster dalam bahasa Inggris adalah bantal guling yang menopang kita.
Contoh_kalimat: She gathered more evidence to bolster her argument.

Mnemonik: Bomb: Kata-katanya meledak-ledak seperti bom (muluk-muluk).
Contoh_kalimat: The politician's bombastic speech lacked real substance.

Mnemonik: Bonus: Mendapat berkah/keuntungan seperti bonus.
Contoh_kalimat: The rain was a great boon for the drought-stricken farmers.

Mnemonik: Brief: Sesuatu yang sangat singkat.
Contoh_kalimat: The brevity of the meeting was appreciated by everyone.

Makna: To intimidate in an overbearing manner
Mnemonik: Brow (alis) + beat: Mengerutkan alis untuk mengintimidasi/menggertak.
Contoh_kalimat: The lawyer tried to browbeat the witness into changing her story.

Mnemonik: Bump: Suka menabrak (bump) orang lain karena terlalu sombong/memaksa.
Contoh_kalimat: The bumptious newcomer annoyed everyone with his endless bragging.

Makna: To perform clumsily or inadequately; botch
Mnemonik: Bunglon: Bunglon yang salah warna berarti melakukan kesalahan bodoh/ceroboh.
Contoh_kalimat: The inexperienced robbers completely bungled the heist.

Makna: To grow forth; to send out buds
Mnemonik: Burger: Makan burger terus membuat perut berkembang/membesar.
Contoh_kalimat: The tech industry in the city began to burgeon in the late 90s.

Makna: A disagreeable, harsh, or discordant sound
Mnemonik: Kakatua + phone: Suara burung kakatua di telepon sangat bising/sumbang.
Contoh_kalimat: The busy intersection produced a cacophony of honking horns.

Mnemonik: Kapalan: Kulit yang kapalan (callus) menjadi mati rasa/tidak sensitif.
Contoh_kalimat: His callous remark about her failure made her cry.

Makna: To make false and malicious statements about
Mnemonik: Kolom niat: Menulis di kolom koran dengan niat memfitnah.
Contoh_kalimat: The political campaign was designed to calumniate the rival candidate.

Makna: The quality of being open and sincere
Mnemonik: Kendor: Urat tegangnya kendor karena dia berbicara dengan jujur/terbuka.
Contoh_kalimat: I appreciate your candor in delivering the bad news.

Mnemonik: Tank: Orang ini mudah meledak seperti tank, sangat suka marah.
Contoh_kalimat: The cantankerous old man yelled at the kids playing near his lawn.

Mnemonik: Ikan karper: Ikan yang mulutnya selalu terbuka seolah mengeluh terus.
Contoh_kalimat: He is hard to please and will carp about the smallest flaws.

Makna: A state of disorder and confusion
Mnemonik: Kekacauan: (Kata serapan) Keadaan yang sangat kacau balau.
Contoh_kalimat: The store was in complete chaos during the Black Friday sale.

Mnemonik: Chicken: Pengecut yang menggunakan kelicikan/tipuan untuk menang.
Contoh_kalimat: The corrupt salesman used chicanery to sell broken cars.

Makna: A rude, boorish, or surly person
Mnemonik: Curl: Orang berambut keriting yang kasar/tidak sopan (hanya asosiasi visual).
Contoh_kalimat: Don't be such a churl; say thank you when someone helps you.

Makna: Concluding section of a musical/literary piece
Mnemonik: Code: Menulis kode terakhir sebagai penutup program.
Contoh_kalimat: The movie's coda showed what happened to the characters ten years later.

Makna: To assemble related laws or principles
Mnemonik: Kode: Mengumpulkan aturan menjadi sebuah sistem kode.
Contoh_kalimat: The organization decided to codify its unwritten rules into a handbook.

Mnemonik: Recognize: Seseorang yang bisa mengenali berarti dia sadar/paham.
Contoh_kalimat: We must be cognizant of the environmental impact of our actions.

Mnemonik: Co-host: Teman atau rekan kerja dalam satu grup.
Contoh_kalimat: The suspect and his cohorts were arrested by the police.

Mnemonik: Call lokal: Bahasa yang dipakai saat menelpon orang lokal (bahasa sehari-hari).
Contoh_kalimat: The essay was rejected because it used too much colloquial language.

Makna: Corresponding in amount, quality, or degree
Mnemonik: Common measure: Ukuran yang sama, berarti sebanding/setimpal.
Contoh_kalimat: Your salary will be commensurate with your experience.

Makna: A feeling of quiet security; satisfaction
Mnemonik: Complete: Merasa sudah lengkap sehingga menjadi terlalu puas diri.
Contoh_kalimat: The team's complacency after their first win cost them the championship.

Makna: A state of seeking to reconcile or make peace
Mnemonik: Konsiliasi: Usaha untuk melakukan perdamaian.
Contoh_kalimat: He sent a box of chocolates as a conciliatory gesture after their fight.

Mnemonik: Konkret: Nyata, seperti beton (fakta keras).
Contoh_kalimat: We need concrete evidence before making an accusation.

Makna: One to whom secrets are confided
Mnemonik: Confident: Orang yang membuat kita percaya diri untuk membagikan rahasia.
Contoh_kalimat: She told her deepest secrets to her trusted confidante.

Mnemonik: Kongruen: Dalam matematika, kongruen berarti sama dan sebangun/sesuai.
Contoh_kalimat: His stylish outfit was congruous with the elegant setting of the party.

Mnemonik: Monster nation: Negara diserang monster menimbulkan kepanikan luar biasa.
Contoh_kalimat: To my consternation, I realized I had lost my passport at the airport.

Mnemonik: Consume mate: Menyelesaikan makanan teman sampai tuntas/sempurna.
Contoh_kalimat: He is a consummate professional who always delivers flawless work.

Mnemonik: Contender: Penantang yang selalu suka berkelahi/berdebat.
Contoh_kalimat: Politics is a highly contentious topic at family dinners.

Mnemonik: Count right: Menghitung yang benar setelah sadar berbuat salah, merasa menyesal.
Contoh_kalimat: The contrite child apologized for breaking the vase.

Mnemonik: Continue macet: Terus membuat macet karena keras kepala/memberontak aturan.
Contoh_kalimat: The contumacious prisoner refused to follow the guard's orders.

Mnemonik: Sirup kordial: Rasanya manis dan ramah di tenggorokan.
Contoh_kalimat: Despite their divorce, they maintain a cordial relationship.

Mnemonik: Co-robot: Robot lain datang untuk mengonfirmasi/mendukung temuan.
Contoh_kalimat: The security camera footage will corroborate my story.

Makna: Appearance, especially the look of the face
Mnemonik: Count ten: Hitung sampai sepuluh untuk menjaga ekspresi wajah agar tidak marah.
Contoh_kalimat: His calm countenance reassured the frightened passengers.

Makna: To go against or attempt to undermine
Mnemonik: Counter-attack: Serangan balik untuk melawan.
Contoh_kalimat: She proposed a new strategy to counter the competitor's move.

Makna: A person or thing resembling another
Mnemonik: Bagian lain: Pasangan atau rekan sejawat.
Contoh_kalimat: The CEO met with his European counterpart to discuss the merger.

Mnemonik: Cave in: Menyerah dan masuk gua karena pengecut.
Contoh_kalimat: Running away and leaving his friends behind was a craven act.

Makna: Willingness to behave or trust too readily
Mnemonik: Kredit: Memberi kredit (kepercayaan) terlalu mudah, sangat gampang ditipu.
Contoh_kalimat: The scammer preyed on the credulity of elderly victims.

Makna: The practice of favoring one’s friends
Mnemonik: Kronisme: Mengistimewakan kelompok/kroni (nepotisme teman).
Contoh_kalimat: The mayor was accused of cronyism for giving jobs to his unqualified friends.

Mnemonik: Kurma john: Si John marah-marah terus karena kurmanya dicuri (pemarah).
Contoh_kalimat: The neighborhood curmudgeon hates when kids step on his grass.

Mnemonik: Kursor: Menggerakkan kursor komputer dengan cepat dan sekilas saja.
Contoh_kalimat: She gave the document only a cursory glance before signing it.

Mnemonik: Death earth: Bumi mati karena kekurangan air.
Contoh_kalimat: There is a dearth of affordable housing in the city.

Mnemonik: Di-bakar: Rencananya hangus dibakar, sebuah kegagalan total.
Contoh_kalimat: The poorly planned event turned into a complete debacle.

Makna: Orderliness and good taste in manners
Mnemonik: Dekor: Mendekorasi ruangan agar terlihat sopan dan pantas.
Contoh_kalimat: He maintained perfect decorum during the solemn ceremony.

Makna: In a state of giving in out of respect
Mnemonik: Defer: Menunda keputusan sendiri demi menghormati orang lain.
Contoh_kalimat: The young soldier was highly deferent to his commanding officer.

Mnemonik: Delete: Virus yang menghapus data sangat merugikan/berbahaya.
Contoh_kalimat: Smoking has a highly deleterious effect on lung health.

Makna: To represent by sketch or precisely in words
Mnemonik: Line (garis): Menggambar garis untuk menjelaskan secara rinci.
Contoh_kalimat: The map clearly delineates the border between the two countries.

Makna: The state of being morally bad or evil
Mnemonik: Deprive: Dicabut moralnya sehingga menjadi jahat/korup.
Contoh_kalimat: The serial killer's depravity shocked the entire nation.

Makna: To ridicule; to make fun of
Mnemonik: Di-ride: Dinaiki/dijadikan kuda-kudaan sebagai bentuk ejekan.

Mnemonik: Deride (noun): Tindakan pengejekan.
Contoh_kalimat: His ridiculous proposal was met with derision from the board.

Mnemonik: Derivatif: Kata turunan; sesuatu yang meniru/berasal dari sumber lain.

Mnemonik: De-story: Cerita yang melompat-lompat, tidak terarah.
Contoh_kalimat: He made a desultory effort to clean his room, merely moving a few shirts.

Mnemonik: Die tribe: Mengancam sebuah suku mati lewat kritikan/kecaman tajam.
Contoh_kalimat: The coach launched into a bitter diatribe after the team's embarrassing loss.

Mnemonik: Dikte: Mendikte seseorang karena niatnya menggurui/mengajar.

Mnemonik: Di + confidence: Dikurangi kepercayaannya, merasa ragu/malu-malu.
Contoh_kalimat: Her diffidence prevented her from speaking up in meetings.

Mnemonik: Delay story: Membuat cerita panjang lebar hanya untuk menunda-nunda.
Contoh_kalimat: The contractor's dilatory tactics delayed the project by months.

Mnemonik: Dis-concert: Konser yang batal membuat penonton bingung/kacau.
Contoh_kalimat: The unexpected hard question disconcerted the confident interviewee.

Makna: Using one’s own judgment; being discreet
Mnemonik: Diskresi: Kebebasan untuk menilai dan bertindak hati-hati.
Contoh_kalimat: Viewers are advised to use discretion due to the film's violence.

Mnemonik: Dis (tidak) + genuine (asli): Tidak asli alias tidak tulus/munafik.
Contoh_kalimat: His apology felt disingenuous since he kept repeating the same mistake.

Makna: Lack of calm, peace, or ease
Mnemonik: Dis (tidak) + quiet (tenang): Perasaan gelisah/tidak tenang.

Mnemonik: Dis-assemble: Membongkar wajah asli untuk berpura-pura.
Contoh_kalimat: She tried to dissemble her disappointment with a fake smile.

Makna: Breaking up of a union of persons
Mnemonik: Dissolve: Gula larut/hancur di air, artinya pembubaran.

Mnemonik: Dis (tidak) + sonata (lagu): Musik yang sumbang/tidak harmonis.

Mnemonik: Divergen: Bergerak ke arah yang berbeda (menyimpang).

Mnemonik: Di-vest: Melepaskan rompi (vest), artinya mencabut hak/harta.
Contoh_kalimat: The company decided to divest its underperforming assets.

Makna: To tell or make known secret
Mnemonik: Di-vulgar: Membuat rahasia menjadi vulgar/umum (membocorkan).
Contoh_kalimat: The journalist refused to divulge the name of her secret source.

Makna: Fanatical about enforcing a certain principle
Mnemonik: Doktrin: Orang yang memaksakan doktrin/teori tanpa melihat realita.
Contoh_kalimat: The doctrinaire manager refused to change the rules, even when they failed.

Mnemonik: Dogma: Percaya buta pada dogma secara kaku dan mutlak.
Contoh_kalimat: She is so dogmatic that she refuses to listen to any other opinions.

Makna: A state of inactivity or low spirits
Mnemonik: Dull drums: Bermain drum dengan bosan, sedang dalam kelesuan/kesedihan.
Contoh_kalimat: The economy is stuck in the doldrums with no growth in sight.

Mnemonik: Doubt: Sangat meragukan.
Contoh_kalimat: I am very dubious about his promise to pay me back tomorrow.

Makna: Someone who’s easily fooled; to fool someone
Mnemonik: Duplikat: Diberi barang duplikat sehingga dia tertipu.
Contoh_kalimat: The salesman duped the elderly couple into buying a useless product.

Mnemonik: Duplicate face: Orang bermuka dua, penuh kelicikan/penipuan.
Contoh_kalimat: Her duplicity was exposed when her emails to the rival company were found.

Mnemonik: Red Bull: Minum Red Bull membuatnya sangat antusias/bersemangat.
Contoh_kalimat: The ebullient fans cheered loudly when their team scored the winning goal.

Makna: Drawn from multiple sources or styles
Mnemonik: Koleksi: Mengoleksi dari berbagai macam sumber/gaya.
Contoh_kalimat: His music taste is eclectic, ranging from jazz to heavy metal.

Makna: Capable of producing the intended result
Mnemonik: Efektif: Sesuatu yang manjur/mujarab.

Makna: Power to produce an intended effect
Mnemonik: Efektivitas: Kemanjuran.

Mnemonik: In front: Melakukan hal memalukan di depan (in front) umum karena bermuka badak.

Mnemonik: Egg regions: Melempar telur ke satu daerah karena kesalahan yang sangat parah.
Contoh_kalimat: The article was pulled because of an egregious error in the first paragraph.

Mnemonik: Ex + progress: Bergerak keluar (pintu keluar).
Contoh_kalimat: The emergency egress was blocked by boxes, violating fire codes.

Mnemonik: Allergy: Alergi parah sampai meninggal, lalu dibuatkan puisi kematian/ratapan.
Contoh_kalimat: The poet wrote a beautiful elegy for his late mother.

Mnemonik: Explicit: Memancing agar informasi keluar secara eksplisit (memancing respons).
Contoh_kalimat: The detective tried to elicit a confession from the suspect.

Makna: Pride in belonging to a select group
Mnemonik: Elit: Merasa dari golongan elit.

Mnemonik: Bell: Menempelkan lonceng agar terlihat lebih indah/berhias.
Contoh_kalimat: He likes to embellish his fishing stories to make them sound more exciting.

Makna: Proven by observed occurrence or existence
Mnemonik: Empire: Kerajaan dibangun berdasarkan bukti nyata (empiris/terbukti).

Mnemonik: Emulator: Software peniru, artinya meniru untuk menyamai.
Contoh_kalimat: The young writer tried to emulate the style of Hemingway.

Makna: Characteristic of a specific place or culture
Mnemonik: Endemi: Penyakit/hal yang khas di daerah tertentu.

Mnemonik: Energy vaporate: Energinya menguap, sehingga dia melemah.
Contoh_kalimat: The hot sun enervated the hikers, forcing them to rest frequently.

Makna: To produce or to make something come into existence
Mnemonik: Gender: Melahirkan gender baru, artinya menimbulkan/menghasilkan.

Mnemonik: Enigma: Mesin sandi perang dunia, sangat penuh misteri.
Contoh_kalimat: Mona Lisa's enigmatic smile has fascinated art lovers for centuries.

Mnemonik: Annoy: Sangat mengganggu (annoying) sampai menimbulkan kebosanan luar biasa (kebosanan akut).
Contoh_kalimat: The wealthy heir suffered from ennui, finding no joy in his endless free time.

Mnemonik: Fame: Kepopuleran (fame) itu hanya sesaat/tidak abadi.
Contoh_kalimat: The beauty of a rainbow is ephemeral, lasting only a few minutes.

Makna: Free from many changes or variations
Mnemonik: Equal: Selalu sama/setara, karakternya tenang dan stabil.

Mnemonik: Equal mind: Pikiran yang seimbang, penuh ketenangan batin.
Contoh_kalimat: He handled the stressful situation with impressive equanimity.

Mnemonik: Equal vocal: Dua suara (vocal) berbicara bersamaan jadi terdengar ambigu/bermakna ganda.
Contoh_kalimat: The politician gave an equivocal answer to avoid taking a clear stance.

Makna: To use ambiguous expressions to mislead
Mnemonik: Vocal: Berbicara secara ambigu/berkelit.

Mnemonik: Erase: Menghapus sampai bersih (membasmi tuntas).
Contoh_kalimat: The organization's goal is to completely eradicate polio.

Mnemonik: Educated: Terdengar seperti orang yang sangat terpelajar/berilmu.
Contoh_kalimat: The erudite professor could speak passionately on almost any historical subject.

Mnemonik: Ah-choo!: Mendengar orang bersin, kita langsung menghindar/menjauh.
Contoh_kalimat: For health reasons, she decided to eschew all processed foods.

Makna: Hard to understand; known only by a few
Mnemonik: Isolasi: Hanya dipahami oleh kelompok yang terisolasi (sulit dipahami umum).

Makna: A nice way of saying something unpleasant
Mnemonik: Eufemisme: Penghalusan bahasa.

Makna: To make sharper or more severe; to make worse
Mnemonik: Extra bad: Membuat situasi menjadi ekstra buruk (memperparah).

Mnemonik: Ex (keluar) + culprit (tersangka): Mengeluarkan dari status tersangka (membebaskan dari tuduhan).

Mnemonik: Exit agency: Biro pintu darurat untuk keadaan mendesak.
Contoh_kalimat: The exigency of the situation requires immediate action.

Makna: To speak or write at some length
Mnemonik: Expand: Memperluas cerita, berbicara panjang lebar.
Contoh_kalimat: The professor expatiated on the causes of the French Revolution for hours.

Makna: The means by which atonement is made
Mnemonik: Ex-pirate: Mantan bajak laut melakukan penebusan dosa.

Mnemonik: Urban (kota): Bersikap sopan santun ala orang kota besar (kesopanan/kehalusan budi).
Contoh_kalimat: The diplomat handled the delicate situation with great urbanity and charm.

Mnemonik: Fosil: Bergetar bimbang apakah ini fosil atau bukan (bimbang/ragu-ragu).
Contoh_kalimat: She vacillated between ordering the steak and the seafood for ten minutes.

Mnemonik: Vagabond: Pengembara/gelandangan.
Contoh_kalimat: The vagabond wandered from town to town, sleeping wherever he could.

Mnemonik: Vain (sia-sia) + glory: Membanggakan kejayaan yang sia-sia (sangat sombong/angkuh).
Contoh_kalimat: The vainglorious actor demanded a mirror in every room of his trailer.

Mnemonik: Valor (berani): Pahlawan yang gagah berani.
Contoh_kalimat: The knight was awarded a medal for his valorous deeds in battle.

Mnemonik: Advantage: Posisi yang memberi keuntungan strategis.
Contoh_kalimat: From our vantage point on the hill, we could see the entire valley.

Makna: Having lost quality and flavor; dull
Mnemonik: Vapor (uap): Rasanya menguap hilang (hambar/membosankan).
Contoh_kalimat: The reality TV show was filled with vapid conversations about shopping.

Mnemonik: Variasi: Beragam warnanya (beraneka ragam/belang-belang).
Contoh_kalimat: The garden was filled with variegated flowers in every color of the rainbow.

Mnemonik: Helm: Melempar helm dengan kuat karena marah (penuh semangat/keras/hebat).
Contoh_kalimat: He issued a vehement denial of the corruption charges.

Mnemonik: Veneer (gigi): Lapisan tipis di gigi agar bagus (lapisan penutup luar/kedok).
Contoh_kalimat: Behind his veneer of politeness, he is actually very cruel.

Makna: To look upon with deep respect
Mnemonik: Veteran: Menghormati veteran perang (sangat menghormati/memuja).
Contoh_kalimat: In many cultures, it is customary to venerate one's ancestors.

Mnemonik: Verify: Sesuatu yang bisa diverifikasi itu jujur/benar.
Contoh_kalimat: The veracious witness told exactly what happened without omitting any details.

Mnemonik: Verb: Terlalu banyak kata kerja/bertele-tele (berlebihan kata).
Contoh_kalimat: The legal contract was full of unnecessary verbiage that confused the clients.

Mnemonik: Verbal boss: Bos yang ngomongnya panjang lebar (bertele-tele/banyak omong).
Contoh_kalimat: The verbose speaker took an hour to explain a five-minute topic.

Mnemonik: Vest (baju sisa): Sisa-sisa evolusi organ (sisa/meninggalkan jejak evolusi).
Contoh_kalimat: The human appendix is considered a vestigial organ with no clear function.

Mnemonik: Via: Bisa lewat jalan (via) ini (bisa hidup/dapat dilaksanakan).
Contoh_kalimat: Solar power is becoming a highly viable alternative to fossil fuels.

Mnemonik: Visi: Visi hidup yang terus berubah (perubahan nasib/pasang surut).
Contoh_kalimat: The vicissitudes of life can turn a rich man into a beggar overnight.

Mnemonik: Figur: Punya figur tubuh yang kuat (stamina/semangat/tenaga).
Contoh_kalimat: Despite his old age, he exercises with the vigor of a twenty-year-old.

Makna: Character or ability of an expert
Mnemonik: Virtuoso: Keahlian tingkat dewa dalam seni (keahlian teknis tingkat tinggi).
Contoh_kalimat: The violinist played the incredibly complex piece with flawless virtuosity.

Mnemonik: Virus: Jahat dan menyebar seperti virus (keganasan/kebencian hebat).
Contoh_kalimat: The virulence of the new virus strain alarmed health officials.

Mnemonik: Vision: Wajah yang masuk dalam penglihatan (wajah/paras/raut muka).
Contoh_kalimat: The weary traveler's visage showed the harshness of his long journey.

Mnemonik: Viskositas: Sifat cairan kental (kental/lengket).
Contoh_kalimat: Honey and syrup are examples of highly viscous liquids.

Mnemonik: Pit viper: Mulut berbisa bagai ular viper (mencaci maki dengan kasar).
Contoh_kalimat: The angry coach vituperated the referee for the terrible penalty call.

Mnemonik: Voice: Suara berisik dan lantang (berisik/bersuara keras menuntut).
Contoh_kalimat: The union workers were vociferous in their demands for higher pay.

Mnemonik: Volatil: Mudah menguap/meledak (mudah berubah/meledak-ledak).
Contoh_kalimat: The stock market can be highly volatile during election years.

Mnemonik: Volunteer: Melakukan dengan kehendak sendiri (kemauan/pilihan sadar).
Contoh_kalimat: She left the company of her own volition, nobody forced her to resign.

Mnemonik: Volume: Volume suaranya diputar terus (fasih/banyak bicara).
Contoh_kalimat: The voluble host kept the party lively with endless stories and jokes.

Mnemonik: Surat perintah (warrant): Memiliki dasar surat yang benar (dibenarkan/dijamin).
Contoh_kalimat: The police use of force was not warranted in such a minor situation.

Mnemonik: Awas (beware): Sangat waspada/berhati-hati.
Contoh_kalimat: You should be wary of emails asking for your banking password.

Mnemonik: Water: Tergulung ombak air besar (kekacauan/bergulingan).
Contoh_kalimat: The suspect's story was a welter of confusing lies and contradictions.

Mnemonik: Wet (basah): Membasahi batu asahan untuk menajamkan pisau (mengasah/merangsang).
Contoh_kalimat: The delicious smell of garlic bread helped to whet my appetite.

Mnemonik: Whim: Berdasar iseng belaka (lucu/aneh/banyak tingkah).
Contoh_kalimat: The author writes whimsical children's stories about talking animals.

Mnemonik: Whirl (berputar): Putaran badai (susunan melingkar/spiral).
Contoh_kalimat: The fingerprints on the glass showed a distinct pattern of whorls.

Mnemonik: Win some (hati): Memenangkan hati banyak orang (sangat menarik/menawan).
Contoh_kalimat: The little girl's winsome smile won over the grumpy old man.

Mnemonik: Wreck (hancur): Menyebabkan kehancuran (menimpakan hukuman/bencana).
Contoh_kalimat: The hurricane is expected to wreak absolute havoc on the coastal towns.

Mnemonik: Ring: Berputar melilit seperti cincin (menggeliat kesakitan).
Contoh_kalimat: The player fell to the ground, writhing in pain after the tackle.

Mnemonik: Years: Tahun-tahun yang lama berlalu (zaman dahulu).
Contoh_kalimat: In days of yore, knights fought dragons to save princesses.

Mnemonik: Zeal (semangat): Orang yang terlalu semangat (orang yang sangat fanatik).
Contoh_kalimat: The political zealot refused to listen to anyone who disagreed with him.

Makna: Intellectual and moral tendencies of age
Mnemonik: Time (zeit) + ghost (geist): Roh/semangat zaman (semangat sebuah zaman/tren era).
Contoh_kalimat: The novel perfectly captured the rebellious zeitgeist of the 1960s.
